summary: Iteration 17: CONTRAST/READABILITY FIX VERIFIED - All admin pages tested for text visibility. The batch fix for light text on dark backgrounds has been successfully applied. Planning page time column now uses dark background with gold text. All admin panels show proper contrast.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - SMS status check endpoint not implemented

passed_tests: 1. Planning (/planning): Time column (16:00, 16:30, 17:00, etc.) VISIBLE with gold text on dark bg-elevated - PASS
2. Planning: Operator header bar uses dark gradient (from-[var(--bg-elevated)] to-[var(--bg-card)]) - PASS
3. Dashboard (/dashboard): All text readable - gold 'Buongiorno!', stats numbers, module labels - PASS
4. Appointments (/appointments): Title, date, empty state text all visible - PASS
5. Clients (/clients): Client names, 'Telefono mancante!' badges (red on light bg) readable - PASS
6. Services (/services): Service cards, category headers, prices all readable - PASS
7. Promotions (/promozioni): Stats cards (pink/blue/green text), badges ('Attiva', 'Online'), promo codes visible - PASS
8. Stats (/stats): €0.00 values, section titles, date range all readable - PASS
9. Report Incassi (/incassi): Revenue cards, payment details visible - PASS
10. Settings (/settings): All form labels, day toggles (gold checked states), section headers readable - PASS
11. Daily Summary (/daily-summary): Chart labels (08-20), stats cards, section titles visible - PASS
12. Expenses (/uscite): Category badges (amber 'Da Pagare', green 'Pagate') readable - PASS
13. Gestione Sito (/gestione-sito): All form labels and inputs visible - PASS
14. NO JS ERRORS: No critical JS errors on any admin page - PASS
15. PUBLIC WEBSITE REGRESSION (/): Hero section loads with 'Bruno Melito Hair', navigation visible - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Contrast fixes correctly applied using CSS variables --text-primary, --text-secondary, --gold
Planning time column now uses bg-[var(--bg-card)] and bg-[var(--bg-elevated)] instead of white
Badge colors properly converted from solid light (bg-X-100) to semi-transparent (bg-X-500/10)
Text colors properly using CSS variables for dark theme compatibility
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 verified: Contrast/readability fix confirmed working across ALL admin pages. The batch fix addressed: 1) PlanningPage time column bg changed from white to dark, 2) All bg-X-100 badges converted to bg-X-500/10, 3) All text-X-700/800 converted to text-X-400, 4) text-X-600 converted to text-X-400. All pages use dark theme with CSS variables: --bg-deep (#0B1120), --bg-card (#111827), --bg-elevated (#1E293B), --text-primary (#F1F5F9), --text-secondary (#94A3B8), --gold (#D4AF37). Minor: SMS status endpoint returns 404 but not blocking.

contrast_fix_verification.planning_time_column: Uses bg-[var(--bg-card)] and bg-[var(--bg-elevated)] with gold text for :00 hours
contrast_fix_verification.badges: All use semi-transparent backgrounds (e.g., bg-green-500/10, bg-pink-500/10) with colored text
contrast_fix_verification.text_colors: Light text (--text-primary, --text-secondary) on dark backgrounds throughout
